title: Costco August sales up 11%
text: Costco Wholesale Corp. COST, -0.39% said late Wednesday its August net sales rose 11.4% to $17.55 billion. Same-store sales rose 10.1%, including a 11% increase for same-store sales in the U.S., the retailer said.

title: Costco Wholesale Corporation Reports August Sales Results
text: ISSAQUAH, Wash., Aug. 31, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Costco Wholesale Corporation (“Costco” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq: COST) today reported net sales of $17.55 billion for the retail month of August, the four weeks ended August 28, 2022, an increase of 11.4 percent from $15.75 billion last year.

title: Is Costco's Substantial Premium Valuation Over Walmart's Justified?
text: Costco and Walmart are both leading general goods retailers that look reasonably similar at a high level.
